programs.title: Devotion
programs.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

programs.title: Perfectly a Strangeness
programs.desc: In the incandescence of an unknown desert, three donkeys discover an abandoned astronomical observatory and the universe.

programs.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programs.desc: The annual land blessing is thrown into disarray when one of the campers goes missing.

programs.title: Born Hungry
programs.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programs.title: Flamin' Hot
programs.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

programs.title: Shifting Gears
programs.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.
